options.name: -help

options.name: -create_rows
options.description: Create rows for endtap cell techSites which do not have rows in the floor plan

options.name: -DoubleHeightIncornerProtrusion
options.description: {true|false} allow double height in-corner cell to protrude into core area

options.name: -enable_shrink_physical_cell_flow
options.description: {true|false} Samsung shrink left/right edge cell flow

options.name: -flipY
options.description: Flips the orientation of the endcap instances in Y direction if the site symmetry allows it.
